name: ALPHA ETF FTSE Athex Large Cap Equity UCITS
summary: ALPHA ETF FTSE Athex Large Cap Equity UCITS aims to track the performance of the FTSE/Athex Large Cap Index, which represents the largest companies listed on the Athens Stock Exchange. The fund provides investors with exposure to the Greek equity market's leading companies. The ETF is UCITS compliant, ensuring adherence to European regulatory standards.

name: iNAV AETF
summary: iNAV AETF refers to an indicative net asset value (iNAV) for an AETF (Actively managed Exchange Traded Fund). The iNAV is an estimate of the fund's per-share value throughout the trading day. The actual fund itself would require further lookup.
